examples: Show them your skill in targeting those wretched Elven Archers!
Elven workers no longer require bronze working to place improvements on forest plots.
Fixed a bug where Medal of Light and Magic Elven Leaf didn't remove curses/diseases when picked up.
For instance, a player might place a pair of Elven boots on a Priest character.
He and co-author Margaret Weis penned some of my favorite characters in the genre, from the twins Raistlin and Caramon Majere to Tanis Half-Elven to the wonderful Tasslehoff.
